desc_auto_writer: Write drafts, rewrite, or paraphrase text automatically based on your writing style.
desc_notes: Jot down quick ideas, attach images, manage tags, and pin your important notes.
desc_brain: Your AI memory center. Manage style rules, thinking patterns, and train the AI with your writing samples.
desc_settings: Configure AI models, manage API keys, synchronize data with GitHub, or export/import your ZIP data.
